title: Alarm shelf with operator approval (UI)
prompt: Configure a high-pressure alert and an operator alarm shelf so an operator can see and acknowledge the alarm without using admin editors.
uiJourney: Explorer (alert rule) → Operator Alarms / alarm shelf dashboard
humanSteps: Select a pressure variable in Explorer and add a high-pressure alert rule.
Ensure Operator UI includes an Alarms or alarm-shelf screen.
Trigger or simulate high pressure; open Operator → Alarms and acknowledge.
